label: Tap water odor spike
title: Stop rotten-egg tap water fast
intro: Searches like "{{query}}" jump whenever algae blooms or chloramine conversions stir up odors. Mission Pure isolates the utility behind the smell and filters it before it reaches {{cityOrRegion}} showers.
bullets: Run the Mission Pure ZIP lookup to confirm which utility feeds {{cityOrRegion}} and whether hydrant flushing or algae blooms are elevating disinfection byproducts.

The Puronics DuoFresh™ Plus iGen® whole-home system uses dual-tank catalytic carbon to strip odor-causing chloramine compounds and DBPs from every tap, shower, and laundry load — no interruption during regeneration.
Pair it with the Puronics Micromax™ 8500 under-sink RO so ice, bottles, and cooking water stay neutral even when the city is shocking mains.

label: PFAS / forever chemicals

bullets: The Puronics Micromax™ 8500 five-stage reverse osmosis system is Mission Pure’s flagship PFAS solution — its high-rejection membrane strips PFAS, lead, chromium-6, and dissolved solids to near-zero levels at the drinking tap.
Whole-home Puronics chlorostatic systems (Terminator® iGen® C, Hydronex® iGen® C) capture a broad mix of PFAS families before they circulate through showers and laundry in {{cityOrRegion}}.
